dimension_explanations.alignment: The organization has a specialized focus on religious and cultural preservation for the Bosniak diaspora, which may represent a lower fit for donors seeking broad humanitarian relief [1]. Its mission is centered on maintaining the continuity of Bosniak mosques and community centers [2].
dimension_explanations.impact: The charity demonstrates strong financial health with a 97.9% program expense ratio, though its direct impact is categorized as capacity building for religious institutions rather than direct service delivery [1][2]. While financial management is efficient, there is a lack of third-party verification regarding specific beneficiary outcomes [1].

strengths.detail: The organization maintains a <cite id="4">program expense ratio of 97.9%</cite>, ensuring that nearly all donor funds directly support community initiatives.
IZBSA reports a <cite id="6">fundraising efficiency of $0.00 per $1 raised</cite>, indicating that administrative and development costs are kept to an absolute minimum.

strengths_deep_dive: The financial health of IZBSA is characterized by high liquidity and low overhead. With <cite id="7">9.2 months of operating reserves</cite>, the organization is well-positioned to handle fluctuations in donation cycles while continuing to fund its <cite id="1">network of Bosniak Islamic centers</cite>. This financial stability is paired with a <cite id="4">97.6% program ratio</cite>, which significantly exceeds the <cite id="8">industry standard of 75%</cite> and the <cite id="9">peer median of 85.3%</cite> for religious and cultural organizations.
rich_narrative.summary: Islamska Zajednica Bosnjaka Sjeverne Amerike (IZBSA) serves as a critical financial and administrative backbone for Bosniak Islamic centers across the United States and Canada. The organization functions as a central fundraising body dedicated to <cite id="1">supporting Bosniak-based Islamic centers and key initiatives</cite> throughout North America. In the 2023 fiscal year, the charity reported a <cite id="2">total revenue of $4,520,145</cite>, representing a significant <cite id="3">three-year revenue growth rate of 42.2%</cite>. This rapid expansion underscores its growing role in preserving the religious and cultural identity of the Bosniak diaspora. The organization operates with a lean financial model, directing <cite id="4">97.6% of its total expenses toward program services</cite>, which primarily involve capacity building and infrastructure support for local mosques. By centralizing resources, IZBSA ensures that smaller community centers have access to the funding necessary for religious education, facility maintenance, and communal services. Despite its scale, the organization maintains <cite id="5">exceptional fundraising efficiency</cite>, reporting a cost of <cite id="6">$0.00 to raise every $1 in contributions</cite>.
